children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: As a condition of obtaining any benefit (including a direct loan, loan guarantee, or payment) described in subsection (b), a borrower must obtain at least catastrophic risk protection insurance coverage under for the crop and crop year for which the benefit is sought, if the coverage is offered by the Corporation.section 1508 of this title
a farm ownership loan (FO) under ;section 1923 of this title
an operating loan (OL) under ; andsection 1942 of this title
an emergency loan (EM) under .section 1961 of this title
